title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.580 - Deputy assessors — qualifications — powers — oath — duties
text:
82.580.  Deputy assessors — qualifications — powers — oath — duties. — Each deputy assessor shall take the same oath as the assessor and shall have the same powers, subject to his control, and shall have been a resident of the city for five years next before appointment.
(L. 1945 p. 1859 § 5)
